properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.description: Further sets of properties characterizing a concept based on the particular context of the class and of the particular instance of the concept being characterized.

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: actionCount
properties.description: The number of times that the action was performed.

properties.name: actionStatus
properties.description: The current state of the action.

properties.name: endTime
properties.description: The time at which performance of the action ended.

properties.name: environment
properties.description: The environment wherein an action occurs.

properties.name: error
properties.description: A characterization of the differences between the expected and the actual performance of the action.

properties.name: instrument
properties.description: The things used to perform an action.

properties.name: location
properties.description: The locations where an action occurs.

properties.name: object
properties.description: The things that the action is performed on/against.

properties.name: participant
properties.description: The supporting (non-primary) performers of an action.

properties.name: performer
properties.description: The primary performer of an action.

properties.name: result
properties.description: The things resulting from performing an action.

properties.name: startTime
properties.description: The time at which performance of the action began.

properties.name: subaction
properties.description: References to other actions that make up part of a larger more complex action.

properties.name: wasInformedBy
properties.description: A re-implementation of the wasInformedBy property in W3C PROV-O, where an entity is exchanged by two activities, 'one activity using the entity generated by the other'. [Ref: https://www.w3.org/TR/prov-o/#wasInformedBy]

The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

VirtualizedComputer.description: A computer (desktop, laptop, or server) that exists as a virtual machine rather than running on physical hardware. The most common form is a server running as a virtual machine in a datacentre or cloud environment, which may itself be the subject of an investigation or host evidence. In a forensic context a virtualized computer may also, for example, be a virtual machine recovered from seized media, a forensic disk image booted as a virtual machine for previewing, or a virtual machine provisioned as an analysis environment.

VirtualizedDevice.description: A device or system that exists as a virtual machine, defined by virtualization configuration and one or more virtual disks rather than running on dedicated physical hardware. A virtualized device may arise in several ways, for example a virtual machine recovered from a suspect's storage, a forensic image booted as a virtual machine for previewing, or a virtual machine built as an analysis platform. This is the parent class for virtualized representations of any device type (e.g. computers, mobile devices).

properties.name: statement
properties.description: A textual statement of an assertion.

properties.name: detectDifficultyRating
properties.description: How difficult the weakness is to detect. Integer score 1-3 (1=Low/easy to detect, 2=Medium, 3=High/hard to detect).

properties.name: evaluatesWeakness
properties.description: Links a weakness evaluation to the specific weakness being assessed.

properties.name: impactRating
properties.description: The impact if this weakness manifests. Integer score 1-3 (1=Low, 2=Medium, 3=High).

properties.name: liImpactScore
properties.description: Computed score from Likelihood x Impact (range 1-9). Low=1, Medium=2, High=3.

properties.name: likelihoodRating
properties.description: The likelihood that this weakness will manifest. Integer score 1-3 (1=Low, 2=Medium, 3=High).

properties.name: rpnScore
properties.description: Risk Priority Number: Likelihood x Impact x Detection Difficulty (range 1-27). Only present when detection difficulty is rated.

WeaknessEvaluationSet.description: A collection of weakness evaluations scoped to a technique or context, with authorship and date metadata. Represents one assessment session.

Wordlist.description: A list of words or terms used as input to techniques such as keyword searching or dictionary-based password attacks. properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.description: Further sets of properties characterizing a concept based on the particular context of the class and of the particular instance of the concept being characterized.

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of a particular concept characterization.

properties.name: objectCreatedTime
properties.description: The time at which a characterization of a concept is created. This time pertains to the time of creating the record object, and is not an intrinsic characteristic of the concept.

properties.name: objectMarking
properties.description: Marking definitions to be applied to a particular concept characterization in its entirety.

properties.description: The current state of formality and acceptance for a UCO object.

properties.name: specVersion
properties.description: The version of UCO ontology or subontology specification used to characterize a concept.

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).

properties.name: modifiedTime
properties.description: Specifies the time that this particular version of the object was modified. The object creator can use the time it deems most appropriate as the time this version of the object was modified. The value of the modified property for a given object version MUST be later than or equal to the value of the created property. Object creators MUST update the modified property when creating a new version of an object. The modified timestamp MUST be precise to the nearest millisecond (exactly three digits after the decimal place in seconds).
